sub_modules.lowpass_fir_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM for the exact 101-tap symmetric Q15 coefficient half-set.
sub_modules.lowpass_fir_mac: Combinational symmetric FIR multiply-accumulate using 64-bit signed accumulation.
sub_modules.lowpass_fir_output_scale: Combinational Q15 normalization by arithmetic right shift of the accumulator.
